positive: A stylized, symmetrical mandala design featuring interwoven celestial elements like crescent moons, stylized constellations, and geometric lotus flowers. The color palette is limited to deep indigo, metallic gold, and matte obsidian black, emphasizing high contrast and strong, clean silhouettes. The composition is centrally focused, suitable for large-scale apparel printing, rendered with a delicate line-art style mixed with deep, saturated cosmic gradients. Minimal detail variation across the surface to maintain print consistency. Symmetry, elegant, modern psychedelic.
negative: blurry, amateur, watermark, signature, text, logo, writing, jpeg artifacts, oversaturated, low resolution, poor anatomy, poorly rendered, excess noise, extra limbs, multiple subjects
